name: Franklin X-26 Indoor Pickleballs
description: The Franklin X-26 offers reliable indoor performance at a budget-friendly price. The 26-hole pattern provides a slower flight speed and softer feel compared to outdoor balls, making it ideal for beginners learning the game in gym or recreation center settings. Pack of 3.
care_instructions: Wipe with a damp cloth as needed. Indoor balls are more durable than outdoor balls but should still be replaced when they lose roundness or develop soft spots.
